message:
Gate messaging module behind kafka feature and remove unused Redis imports

The messaging module (containing Kafka and Redis clients) was previously
compiled on all non-WASM targets regardless of whether the kafka feature
was enabled. This caused unnecessary compilation of rdkafka and its
transitive C dependencies even when only the core runtime was needed.

- Change cfg guard on `pub mod messaging` from
  `#[cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))]` to
  `#[cfg(all(not(target_arch = "wasm32"), feature = "kafka"))]`
  so the entire messaging module is excluded unless kafka is opted in
- Remove two unused imports in redis.rs (`RedisPubSub`, `Transaction`)
  left over from the earlier refactor in 6826ed86 that moved them to
  dedicated submodules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
